evals.prompt: Add full SEO content for the 'separator' pattern category in seo.json following ReUI conventions.
evals.expected_output: Should read pattern-seo-playbook or apply its rules: no em dash (U+2014); valid JSON; relatedComponents with title, integrationBody paragraphs and [[slug|Label]] inline links, no rendered link list; content.faqs 5–7 items; no FAQ subtitle in UI; keywords array for metadata.
assertions: No em dash character in proposed copy
sections aim for multiple paragraphs per section
Valid JSON structure for seo.json category
Does not recommend keyword badge UI on the page

evals.prompt: Expand the accordion category SEO in seo.json to be more comprehensive without breaking the site.
evals.expected_output: Should preserve JSON validity; avoid em dashes; expand summary, sections, faqs, and relatedComponents.body in line with depth targets; keep FAQ answers substantive; internal links only via [[slug|Label]] in relatedComponents.
assertions: Expands content without duplicate boilerplate across unrelated categories
